# Animations with `gganimate` and `plotly`

Give reference page. Explain how to read it. Nested lists, each level down is new list.

Give theme page also. Basically give everything that I often want to remember.
Plotly examples here https://plotly.com/r/
 

## Lesson Objectives

### Discussion

- What questions about EV charging stations are you interested in answering? 
- Introduce the data
- How can you answer those with this data? Can some of them not be answered? Possibly update your list of questions. 
- Live coding. We’ll start answering those questions in class.
